footer_cta_chat_note: No sign-up needed — feel free to ask anything.
modal_reserve_sub: Feel free to just ask a question, too ♡
modal_line_note: Get +10 min free when you book via LINE!
modal_chat_note: No sign-up needed — feel free to ask anything.
asr_care_p1: Our girls always carry cash and small change for your visit, so payment is settled on the spot. No more waiting for the driver to bring your change later, and no awkward moments handling cash.
asr_care_p2: This is so you never have to worry or feel you're putting us out. It also keeps our schedule running smoothly, so other guests waiting for their appointment aren't kept waiting, and our girls can see as many guests as possible.
asr_care_p3: You won't need to worry about any cash-handling trouble with the driver, so you can simply relax and enjoy your time. Every little detail, done with care — that's the Admi way of hospitality ♡
asr_hotel_p1: Every single booking we've handled has become part of Admi's hotel know-how. 'Hotels we can enter directly,' 'hotels that need a pickup,' 'hotels where the front desk says no' — we track and update the latest situation for every area, every day. That's why we can give you a clear answer on the spot when you ask, 'Can we visit that hotel?'
asr_hotel_p2: At some hotels, you might only find out after booking that a visit 'actually wasn't possible' — and an unexpected cancellation fee can come with that. Please feel free to use our 'quick check before you call' to avoid exactly that.
asr_hotel_p3: Whether or not you end up booking, we're always happy to answer a simple question like 'Is this hotel okay?' Feel free to ask us anything — from whether a pickup is needed to how to find the room.
girls_none: No girls to show right now.

recruit_hero_title_html:
A shop where young women
can genuinely earn well.
recruit_hero_lead_html:
Ages 18–33, no experience needed.
20 years of privacy protection, run by a female manager your age.
It's totally fine to just talk first.
recruit_hero_note: Just asking a question or chatting is welcome too ♡
recruit_section_anchor_heading: Let's start with what worries you most
recruit_anchor1_text: Since our founding, staying undetected has always been our top priority. It's fine even with no face photos or no photos published at all. We strictly protect your stage name, never require your real name, and provide full alibi support.
recruit_anchor2_text: Our female manager, born in 1995, is right there as your peer to talk to. Things that are hard to say to male staff can be discussed together from a woman's perspective.
recruit_anchor3_title: About 70% of our staff started with no experience.
recruit_anchor3_text: 15 out of 23 staff members started from zero experience. With training and dedicated instructors, it's fine if you know nothing at all. You can start at your own pace.
recruit_pay_head_html: 💖 Trial shifts come with a guaranteed daily pay. Solid earnings from day one.
recruit_pay_note_html:
※ Commission rate is 54.5–62.9%, with plans such as a mobility bonus of 70% or more available to choose freely.
※ A ¥23,000 sign-on bonus is provided, and full daily pay is available.
recruit_safety_lead: We've spent 20 years protecting the "I absolutely don't want anyone to know" for our staff.
recruit_privacy_1: No face photos required at all (you can work without any photos published)
recruit_privacy_2: Face photos are mosaicked, blurred, or edited for your peace of mind
recruit_privacy_3: Work under a stage name — your real name is never required
recruit_privacy_4: Alibi support available (proof of employment, pay slips issued)
recruit_privacy_5: Strict rule against staff sharing each other's personal information
recruit_privacy_6: Interviews held in a private booth to protect your information
recruit_merit1_text: Right by the north exit of JR Tachikawa Station. Easy and safe for commuting to and from work.
recruit_merit2_text: Private rooms plus a free lounge available. You can relax without worry while waiting.
recruit_merit3_text: You receive your full pay on the day you work. Great peace of mind when you need cash right away.
recruit_merit4_text: Hygiene supplies and costumes are all provided free of charge. Up to 3 sets of work lingerie are also gifted.
recruit_merit5_text: Pick-up/drop-off service covers even the last train hours, so getting home late at night is worry-free.
recruit_merit6_text: A certified therapist is on staff, so you can ease your fatigue during downtime for free.
recruit_merit7_text: From manners and service to SNS tips, our female instructors will carefully guide you through everything.
recruit_merit8_text: We provide a reassuring system for those who want to work with us long-term.
recruit_gallery1_note: A space where you can relax on your own
recruit_gallery2_note: Privacy protected, handled by female staff
recruit_gallery3_label: Pick-up service, right by Tachikawa Station
recruit_gallery3_note: Reassuring pick-up service even after the last train
recruit_workstyle1_text: No fixed shift requirements. Work whenever you want, as much as you want.
recruit_workstyle2_title: OK from just 1 day a week
recruit_workstyle2_text: Fits around your main job, studies, or childcare. Side jobs and second incomes are welcome.
recruit_workstyle3_text: Choose your own hours anytime between 10am and 5am the next day, to fit your schedule.
recruit_workstyle4_title: OK to come with a friend
recruit_workstyle4_text: If coming alone feels worrying, it's totally fine to bring a friend along to the interview.
recruit_flow1_text: Just a simple "I saw the job listing" message is fine. Questions or a casual chat alone are also very welcome.
recruit_flow2_text: We'll set the interview date around your schedule. Same-day interviews and trial shifts can be arranged too.
recruit_flow3_text: A female staff member will handle the interview. Feel free to ask anything about pay, work style, or any concerns.
recruit_flow4_text: No need to commit to full employment right away. Try it out first and decide once you've confirmed it's a good fit.
recruit_flow_note: It's completely fine to stop after just the interview or just the trial. We never push or pressure you into anything.
recruit_faq1_q: Is it really OK if I have no experience?
recruit_faq1_a: Yes, it's fine. About 70% of our staff started with no experience, and we offer training and monitored trial sessions led by female instructors. Everyone feels anxious at first, so you can learn gradually at your own pace.
recruit_faq2_a: You can work with your face never shown at all. It's possible to work without any photos published, and any published photos are mosaicked, blurred, or edited. From working under a stage name and never needing your real name, to alibi support — we protect you with 20 years of privacy expertise.
recruit_faq3_q: Are there any quotas or fines?
recruit_faq3_a: None at all. Shifts are fully flexible, with no quotas on the number of shifts or bookings. It's fine to work only when and as much as you want.
recruit_faq4_a: Trial shifts come with a guaranteed daily pay: from ¥37,800 for 3 hours up to ¥126,500 for 10 hours. The commission rate is up to 62.9%, plus a ¥23,000 sign-on bonus, all paid in full daily.
recruit_faq5_q: Can I do this as a second job or as a student?
recruit_faq5_a: Since it's OK from just 1 day a week, you can work around your main job or studies. Side jobs and second incomes are welcome too.
recruit_faq6_q: Can I apply together with a friend?
recruit_faq6_a: Of course, that's fine. If coming alone feels worrying, please bring a friend to your interview.
recruit_cta_title: Why not send us just a quick message first?
recruit_cta_text_html:
Just "I saw the job listing" is fine.
Our female staff will respond at whatever pace suits you.
recruit_cta_foot_suffix: / Not available to those under 18 or high school students
howto_step1_title: Tell us what you're looking for
howto_step1_desc: Feel free to tell us anything — today's recommended girls, your preferred type, a specific request, your preferred time slot, or any options you'd like.
howto_step2_desc: Let us know whether you'd like to meet at home or a hotel, your area (city/ward), and your preferred course.
howto_step3_title: Let us know your payment method
howto_step3_desc: Please tell us whether you'll pay by cash or card, and whether you need a receipt. Once we have this information, our driver staff will head your way with safe driving, keeping the wait as short as possible. While you wait, please look forward to meeting your girl.
howto_facilities_label: Where You Can Use Our Service
howto_facility1_title: For customers using our service at home
howto_facility1_lead: More than half of our customers choose to use our service at home. The reasons why…
howto_facility1_point1: No need to worry about hotel time limits
howto_facility1_point2: No need to go out to use our service
howto_facility1_point3: You can save on hotel fees
howto_facility1_body: The biggest advantage is being able to keep costs down. Many customers use the savings to extend their course and enjoy a more relaxed time. Our girls take great care not to leave any trace in your room, so please wait comfortably at home.
howto_facility2_title: For customers using our service at a hotel
howto_facility2_lead_tachikawa: Centered around the Tachikawa area, hotels let you enjoy our service easily wherever you happen to be.
howto_facility2_lead_kichijoji: Centered around the Kichijoji area, hotels let you enjoy our service easily wherever you happen to be.
howto_facility2_body:
In a non-everyday space, you may feel a bit more excitement and anticipation than usual. It's popular among customers on business trips, those who don't live alone, or those who'd rather not have someone visit their home.

Hotels generally fall into three types — love hotels, business hotels, and rental rooms — with rental rooms offering the best value. We recommend them if you'd like to keep costs down and extend your course.

※ Business hotels may sometimes turn you away at the front desk. We keep track of this information in advance, so please feel free to ask us.
howto_facility3_body:
When using our service at home, we kindly ask you to have a bath towel ready. If you let us know when booking, we can also bring one for you. Please note, however, that we may not always be able to provide one depending on the circumstances.

For cash payments, it would be a great help if you could have the exact amount ready to avoid needing change. If you require a receipt, please let us know when you tell us your payment method.
index_gate_catch1: Truth is, amateurs are the naughtiest of all. ♡
index_gate_catch2: No duds — only naughty amateur girls, delivered straight to you
index_gate_enter_aria: Enter here if you are 18 or older
index_gate_enter_alt: Enter here if you are 18 or older
index_exit_link: If you are under 18, please exit here
index_concept_p2: We carefully select only kind, genuine girls up to age 33 — the kind you'd spot on the street — who combine looks, sensuality, and warmth. Every girl on our roster is a winner, and you'll never get a mechanical, going-through-the-motions service.
index_concept_p3: That college girl's neckline as she walks by, her long slender legs. The tight skirt at the office that traces your subordinate's hips just so. The hem on the station stairs that almost — but doesn't quite — show. "God, I want to touch her." "I want to take her straight to a hotel." "I want to get cozy with her at home." Haven't you ever felt that urge?
index_h2_part1_admi: Admi Tachikawa — In Tachikawa, western Tokyo's greatest pleasure paradise, for
index_h2_part1_kichifu: Admi Kichijoji — In Kichijoji, one of the most popular towns on the Chuo Line, for
index_h2_part2_admi: years of experience. A Tachikawa delivery health service we recommend, delivering our customers the ultimate in sensuality and warmth
index_h2_part2_kichifu: years of experience. A Kichijoji delivery health service delivering our customers the ultimate in sensuality and warmth
index_concept_p1_admi: We are "Admi since2002 Tachikawa Delivery Health & Go To FANTASY Tokyo Main Store," a specialist in naughty amateur girls. Known and loved locally by the nicknames "Tachikawa Admi" and "Admi Tachikawa," we are a highly recommended Tachikawa delivery health service.
index_concept_p1_kichifu: We are... the naughty Admi Kichijoji, since2009 Kichijoji Delivery Health & Go To FANTASY.
index_concept_p4_admi: At Admi Tachikawa Delivery Health, the "girl next door" who turns those urges and fantasies into reality is on duty every day to relieve your pent-up desire. Leave it to us for healing — not just of the body, but of the heart too.
index_concept_p4_kichifu: At Admi Kichijoji Delivery Health, the "girl next door" who turns those urges and fantasies into reality is on duty every day to relieve your pent-up desire. Leave it to us for healing — not just of the body, but of the heart too.
index_concept_p5_admi: Truly satisfying service from considerate, sensual girls. Please enjoy "Admi since2002 Tachikawa Delivery Health & Go To FANTASY Tokyo Main Store" (Tachikawa Admi), a shop centered on Tachikawa City that strives to be loved locally and recommended as a top choice in Tachikawa.
index_concept_p5_kichifu: Truly satisfying service from considerate, sensual girls. Please enjoy Admi Kichijoji, since2009 Kichijoji Delivery Health & Go To FANTASY, a shop centered on Kichijoji and Musashino City, striving to be loved locally all the way to the Mitaka and Nishi-Ogikubo areas.

Now offering special discounted rates off our regular price.
Please enjoy a relaxing, extraordinary time with us.
system_note_combo1: * Courses of 180 minutes or longer can be arranged by combining courses.
system_note_combo_example: [e.g.] 180 min = 90 min course x2 / 300 min = 150 min course x2

system_note_towel: * Customers using our service at home are kindly asked to prepare a bath towel. We can bring one upon request at the time of booking, though this may not always be possible depending on circumstances.
system_overnight_desc: Available from midnight to 10:00 the next morning, for up to 10 hours.
system_overnight_note:
* You may use the service at your preferred time within the 10-hour window.
* For repeat nomination, the fee will be "repeat nomination fee x2"; for regular nomination, "nomination fee x2."

system_fee2_note: For the second or later booking with the same lady

system_note_cancel:
* Please pay any cancellation fee by credit card or bank transfer within 3 days.
* Cancelling a reservation significantly affects other customers and our staff, so please avoid it whenever possible.
system_terms_subtitle: Important notes for customers using our services
system_terms_intro: Customers using our services are asked to read the following terms in advance. By using our service, you are considered to have agreed to these Terms of Use. We may revise these terms from time to time; the revised version will be posted here, so please check the latest content each time you use our service.
system_terms_rules_lead: Please strictly observe the following prohibitions so our staff can provide the best service with peace of mind.
system_terms_li1: Use by persons under 20 years of age
system_terms_li2: Actual intercourse, requests for it, or acts related to it
system_terms_li2_note: Our shop strictly prohibits any actual intercourse.
system_terms_li3: Excessive service requests not on our menu, or acts that the staff finds unpleasant or painful
system_terms_li4_note: If discovered, it will be reported to the police as a criminal act. This also applies to filming with camera phones, so please be careful.
system_terms_li5: Scouting or poaching our staff, or use by persons in the same industry
system_terms_li6: Use by organized crime members or persons associated with them
system_terms_li7: Use by persons under the influence of drugs (marijuana, stimulants, solvents, etc.)
system_terms_li8: Use by persons who are heavily intoxicated
system_terms_li9: Use by persons infected with a sexually transmitted disease or other contagious illness
system_terms_li9_note: This also applies to those who refuse to shower (washing the whole body and private areas) or gargle before the service.
system_terms_li10: Any other person our staff judges to be unsuitable for our service
system_terms_li11: Cases involving abusive language or violence toward our staff or cast members
system_terms_li12: Attempting or arranging to meet outside of our shop (private dates, exclusive arrangements, etc.)
system_terms_li13: Cases involving demands for personal discounts or coercion for free extensions
system_terms_li14: Any other words or behavior that our staff finds unpleasant
system_terms_penalty: Please note that if poaching is discovered, a penalty payment of 1,000,000 yen will be required.
system_terms_final1: * If any of the above applies to you, we will have to decline your use of our service.
system_terms_final2: * If any of the above is discovered even during the service, we will immediately stop the service.
system_terms_final3: Please note that in such cases, no refund of the service fee will be provided.
system_terms_final4: Furthermore, you will be prohibited from using our shop in the future, and your membership will be cancelled.
system_terms_final5: * If the shop deems it necessary, you will be asked to show identification and accompany staff to the local police station.
system_terms_final6: We appreciate your understanding in advance.
system_terms_contact_note: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
system_note_footer:
* All prices include tax.
* Prices and areas are subject to change without notice.
